brush_hair.action_anchor: A person runs a brush through their hair in repeated strokes.
motion_phases: hand grasps brush near head
brush moves through hair along its length
brush lifts away to reset stroke
disambiguation: not combing with fine teeth
not washing or scrubbing hair

catch.action_anchor: A person extends their arms to receive and secure a thrown object with their hands.
motion_phases: arms extend toward incoming object
hands make contact and close around object
arms retract to absorb momentum
disambiguation: not throwing (object leaves hands)
not juggling (continuous toss, no secure reception)

chew.action_anchor: A person rhythmically moves their jaw and cheeks while holding food near or in their mouth.
motion_phases: hand brings food to mouth or food is already in mouth
jaw opens and closes in a repeated, mashing pattern
cheeks subtly flex and relax with each jaw cycle
disambiguation: not a single swallow (gulp)
not idle talking (lips form words)

clap.action_anchor: A person brings their hands together repeatedly to create a sharp sound.
motion_phases: Hands are apart and raised to chest level.
Arms swing inward as palms move directly toward each other.
Palms make forceful contact and then separate again.
disambiguation: not a slow, gentle pat like in 'patting'
not a continuous rubbing motion like in 'rubbing hands'

climb.action_anchor: A person ascends a vertical or steep surface using their limbs.
motion_phases: hands reach upward to secure a grip
feet push off as the body pulls upward
body repositions to find the next hold
disambiguation: not walking up stairs
not crawling on flat ground

climb_stairs.action_anchor: A person ascends a set of steps by alternately lifting each foot.
motion_phases: foot lifts and reaches forward
foot plants on a higher step
body weight shifts upward to the new step
disambiguation: not walking on flat ground
not climbing a vertical rock wall

dive.action_anchor: A person leaps forward or downward, arms extended, and enters a body of water headfirst.
motion_phases: Approach and take-off from a platform with arms raised.
Mid-air forward rotation with body fully extended.
Head-first entry into water, followed by a splash.
disambiguation: not a forward roll on ground
not a simple jump into water feet-first

draw_sword.action_anchor: A person grasps a sheathed sword and pulls it out in a swift, arcing motion.
motion_phases: Hand reaches to grip the sword hilt at the hip.
Arm pulls upward and back, unsheathing the blade.
Sword is fully extended forward or to the side, completing the draw.
disambiguation: not swinging a sword in combat
not slowly picking up a sword from a table

dribble.action_anchor: A person repeatedly bounces a ball with one hand while moving.
motion_phases: hand contacts ball downward
ball rebounds from floor
hand repositions to meet ball
disambiguation: not a stationary bounce
not a throw or catch

drink.action_anchor: A person raises a container to their mouth and tilts it to ingest liquid.
motion_phases: hand grasps container
arm lifts container toward face
head tilts back as container is tipped
disambiguation: not pouring into another vessel
not chewing solid food

fall_floor.action_anchor: A person loses balance and collapses onto the floor.
motion_phases: upright stance with imbalance
rapid uncontrolled descent
full body contact with floor surface
disambiguation: not a controlled sit or lie down
not a stumble or trip without full collapse

flic_flac.action_anchor: A person performs a backward handspring from a standing position.
motion_phases: initial backward lean and arm swing
hands plant on ground as legs kick overhead
feet land and body returns upright
disambiguation: not a forward roll
not a cartwheel

handstand.action_anchor: A person balances upside down on their hands with legs extended upward.
motion_phases: person places hands on ground, shoulders over wrists
legs kick up, body inverts to vertical line
body stabilizes inverted, legs held together upward
disambiguation: not a cartwheel with lateral rotation
not a headstand using head for support

hug.action_anchor: Two people wrap their arms around each other's torsos, pressing their upper bodies together.
motion_phases: Arms extend forward and open.
Arms wrap around the other person's back or torso.
Upper bodies press together and hold.
disambiguation: not a handshake or high-five (no sustained torso contact)
not a kiss (focus is on torso embrace, not head/face contact)

jump.action_anchor: A person propels their body upward into the air, leaving the ground with both feet.
motion_phases: bending knees to lower the body
forceful leg extension launching upward
moment of suspension with feet off the ground
disambiguation: not a running start like 'run'
not a single-leg hop like 'hop'

kiss.action_anchor: Two people bring their lips together in contact.
motion_phases: Heads tilt and move closer together.
Lips make soft contact and may press gently.
Heads slowly separate, ending the contact.
disambiguation: not a hug, which involves full torso embrace
not a whisper, which involves close proximity but no lip contact

pullup.action_anchor: A person grasps an overhead bar and lifts their body upward until their chin clears the bar.
motion_phases: hands grip the bar with arms extended
body pulls upward in a vertical line
chin rises above the bar before lowering
disambiguation: not a push-up on the ground
not a stationary chin-up hold

punch.action_anchor: A person's fist makes forceful forward contact with a target.
motion_phases: arm retracts with fist clenched
arm extends rapidly forward
fist impacts and rebounds from target
disambiguation: not a pushing motion with open palm
not a gentle tapping motion

push.action_anchor: A person extends their arms to apply force against an object, moving it away.
motion_phases: arms bend and hands contact object
torso leans forward as arms extend
object moves away while hands maintain contact
disambiguation: not pulling object toward body
not hitting with a swinging motion

ride_bike.action_anchor: A person sits on a bicycle seat and pedals to propel forward.
motion_phases: person mounts bicycle and grasps handlebars
feet engage pedals in circular motion
bicycle moves forward with rider maintaining balance
disambiguation: not pushing a bicycle while walking
not stationary bike pedaling without forward travel

ride_horse.action_anchor: A person sits atop a horse, holding reins while the horse moves forward.
motion_phases: person mounts horse and settles into saddle
person holds reins, legs in stirrups as horse begins walking or trotting
person's torso moves rhythmically with horse's gait, maintaining balance
disambiguation: not dismounting from horse
not leading horse by reins while walking beside it

shake_hands.action_anchor: Two people grasp each other's right hands and move them up and down.
motion_phases: hands approach and make palm-to-palm contact
hands interlock and are lifted together
hands are lowered and released
disambiguation: not a static hand hold
not a high five or slap

shoot_bow.action_anchor: A person draws and releases a bowstring to propel an arrow.
motion_phases: hand draws bowstring back to anchor point near face
body stabilizes in a braced stance with bow arm extended
fingers release bowstring, propelling arrow forward
disambiguation: not throwing an object like a ball
not pulling a rope without a bow

situp.action_anchor: A person lies on their back and raises their torso to a sitting position.
motion_phases: Lying supine with knees bent and feet flat.
Contracting abdominal muscles to lift the torso forward.
Torso reaches a vertical sitting position before lowering back down.
disambiguation: not lying still or sleeping
not a leg raise or crunch

stand.action_anchor: A person maintains an upright posture with both feet on the ground.
motion_phases: person is stationary with upright torso
feet remain flat and in contact with the ground
body exhibits minimal sway or postural adjustment
disambiguation: not sitting or lying down
not walking or shifting weight between feet

sword.action_anchor: A person swings a bladed weapon through the air.
motion_phases: arm draws back with sword gripped
torso rotates as arm swings forward in an arc
sword follows through to a stopping position
disambiguation: not a static pose like 'sword exercise'
not a throwing motion like 'throw'

sword_exercise.action_anchor: A person performs a sequence of martial arts movements with a sword.
motion_phases: sword is raised or held in a starting stance
sword is swung or thrust in a controlled, patterned arc
body and sword return to a poised or finishing position
disambiguation: not a random sword fight with chaotic strikes
not a static pose like holding a sword still

throw.action_anchor: A person propels an object through the air using a rapid arm motion.
motion_phases: arm draws back or winds up
arm accelerates forward
object releases from hand into flight
disambiguation: not a gentle toss
not a pushing motion

turn.action_anchor: A person rotates their body around a vertical axis.
motion_phases: Initial stationary stance facing one direction.
Torso and shoulders initiate rotation, feet pivot.
Body completes rotation to face a new direction.
disambiguation: not a step or walk (no locomotion)
not a spin (slower, controlled pivot)

walk.action_anchor: A person moves forward by alternating steps with one foot always in contact with the ground.
motion_phases: One leg swings forward while the other supports the body.
The swinging foot makes contact with the ground, heel first.
The body's weight shifts forward onto the new supporting leg as the trailing leg begins its swing.
disambiguation: not running (no flight phase with both feet off ground)
not crawling (body upright, not on hands and knees)

wave.action_anchor: A person moves their hand and arm side-to-side repeatedly.
motion_phases: Arm lifts with elbow bent, hand open.
Hand sweeps laterally away from the body.
Hand returns to starting position, completing one cycle.
disambiguation: not a static hand pose like 'point'
not a forceful forward motion like 'push'
